sentences.target: Je reste ici parce que je suis fatigué.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɛst isi paʁs kə ʒə sɥi fatiɡe/

translations.fr: Je reste ici parce que je suis fatigué.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɛst isi paʁs kə ʒə sɥi fatiɡe/
translations.en: I'm staying here because I'm tired.
translations.es: Me quedo aquí porque estoy cansado.
translations.de: Ich bleibe hier, weil ich müde bin.
translations.zh-Hans: 我累了，所以我待在这儿。
translations.ru: Я остаюсь здесь, потому что устал.
translations.he: אני נשאר כאן כי אני עייף.
translations.vi: Tôi ở lại đây vì tôi mệt.
translations.nl: Ik blijf hier omdat ik moe ben.
translations.hi: मैं यहाँ रह रहा हूँ क्योंकि मैं थका हुआ हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg blir her fordi jeg er trøtt.
translations.id: Saya tetap di sini karena saya lelah.
translations.sv: Jag stannar här eftersom jag är trött.
translations.ro: Rămân aici pentru că sunt obosit.
translations.da: Jeg bliver her, fordi jeg er træt.
translations.ja: 疲れているのでここにいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular): 'to stay/remain'.
Adverb of place.
First part of the multiword subordinating conjunction 'parce que' ('because').
Second part of 'parce que'; subordinating conjunction introducing a finite clause.
1st person singular subject pronoun in the subordinate clause.
Copular auxiliary 'être', present (1st person singular), linking subject to predicate.
Predicate adjective (masculine singular) serving as subject complement.

sentences.target: Tu peux venir vite parce que c’est urgent.
sentences.reading: /ty pø vəniʁ vit paʁs kə sɛ yʁʒɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux venir vite parce que c’est urgent.
translations.ipa: /ty pø vəniʁ vit paʁs kə sɛ yʁʒɑ̃/
translations.en: You can come quickly because it’s urgent.
translations.de: Komm schnell, denn es ist dringend.
translations.vi: Hãy đến nhanh vì việc này khẩn cấp.
translations.hi: जल्दी आओ, यह बहुत ज़रूरी है.
translations.ja: 急ぎなので早く来てください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun (informal).
Modal verb, present (2nd person singular), expressing ability/permission; takes an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb complement of the modal 'pouvoir'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase.
First part of the multiword subordinating conjunction 'parce que' ('because').
Second part of 'parce que'; subordinating conjunction introducing the reason clause.
Clitic subject pronoun 'ce' elided before a vowel.
Copular auxiliary 'être', present (3rd person singular).
Predicate adjective functioning as subject complement.

sentences.target: Elle marche parce que le bus est plein.
sentences.reading: /ɛl maʁʃ paʁs kə lə bys ɛ plɛ̃/

translations.fr: Elle marche parce que le bus est plein.
translations.ipa: /ɛl maʁʃ paʁs kə lə bys ɛ plɛ̃/
translations.en: She is walking because the bus is full.
translations.es: Ella camina porque el autobús está lleno.
translations.de: Sie geht zu Fuß, weil der Bus voll ist.
translations.it: Lei cammina perché l'autobus è pieno.
translations.zh-Hans: 她走路，因为公交车满了。
translations.ru: Она идёт пешком, потому что автобус переполнен.
translations.pt: Ela vai a pé porque o ônibus está cheio.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đi bộ vì xe buýt đã đầy.
translations.nl: Ze loopt omdat de bus vol is.
translations.uk: Вона йде пішки, бо автобус переповнений.
translations.hu: Gyalog megy, mert a busz tele van.
translations.hi: वह चल रही है क्योंकि बस भरी हुई है.
translations.pl: Ona idzie pieszo, bo autobus jest pełny.
translations.el: Πηγαίνει με τα πόδια γιατί το λεωφορείο είναι γεμάτο.
translations.nb: Hun går fordi bussen er full.
translations.sv: Hon går eftersom bussen är full.
translations.ro: Ea merge pe jos pentru că autobuzul este plin.
translations.cs: Jde pěšky, protože autobus je plný.
translations.da: Hun går, fordi bussen er fuld.
translations.fi: Hän kävelee, koska bussi on täynnä.
translations.ja: バスが満員なので彼女は歩いています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
Main verb, present (3rd person singular): 'to walk'.
First part of the multiword subordinating conjunction 'parce que' ('because').
Second part of 'parce que'; introduces the subordinate reason clause.
Definite article, masculine singular determiner.
Common noun, masculine.
Copular auxiliary 'être', present (3rd person singular).
Predicate adjective agreeing with 'le bus' (masculine singular).

sentences.target: Nous restons dehors parce qu’il fait bon.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁɛstɔ̃ dəɔʁ paʁs kil fɛ bɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous restons dehors parce qu’il fait bon.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁɛstɔ̃ dəɔʁ paʁs kil fɛ bɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re staying outside because the weather is nice.
translations.es: Nos quedamos fuera porque hace buen tiempo.
translations.de: Wir bleiben draußen, weil das Wetter schön ist.
translations.it: Restiamo fuori perché il tempo è bello.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们待在外面，因为天气很好。
translations.yue: 我哋留喺出面，因為天氣好好。
translations.ru: Мы остаёмся на улице, потому что погода хорошая.
translations.pt: Ficamos lá fora porque o tempo está bom.
translations.he: אנחנו נשארים בחוץ כי מזג האוויר נעים.
translations.tr: Hava güzel olduğu için dışarıda kalıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ở ngoài vì thời tiết đẹp.
translations.ar: نبقى في الخارج لأن الطقس لطيف.
translations.nl: We blijven buiten omdat het weer goed is.
translations.uk: Ми залишаємося надворі, бо погода хороша.
translations.hu: Kint maradunk, mert jó az idő.
translations.hi: हम बाहर रह रहे हैं क्योंकि मौसम अच्छा है.
translations.pl: Zostajemy na zewnątrz, bo pogoda jest ładna.
translations.el: Μένουμε έξω γιατί ο καιρός είναι καλός.
translations.nb: Vi blir ute fordi været er fint.
translations.id: Kami tetap di luar karena cuacanya bagus.
translations.sv: Vi stannar ute eftersom vädret är fint.
translations.ro: Stăm afară pentru că vremea este frumoasă.
translations.cs: Zůstáváme venku, protože je hezké počasí.
translations.da: Vi bliver udenfor, fordi vejret er godt.
translations.fi: Pysymme ulkona, koska sää είναι hyvä.
translations.ja: 天気がいいので私たちは外にいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present (1st person plural): 'to stay/remain'.
Adverb of place.
First part of the multiword subordinating conjunction 'parce que' ('because').
Elided subordinating conjunction 'que' before a vowel.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; impersonal 'it' in a weather expression.
Main verb, present (3rd person singular) in the impersonal weather expression 'il fait ...'.
Predicate adjective; in 'il fait bon', means the weather is pleasant.

Elle marche parce que le bus est plein.
Nous restons dehors parce qu’il fait bon.

en: I'm staying here because I'm tired.
You can come quickly because it’s urgent.
She is walking because the bus is full.
We’re staying outside because the weather is nice.
